name: trading-tools
description: Alpaca and Robinhood MCP access for market data and trading workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Alpaca and Robinhood MCPs for trading workflows.
interface.longDescription: Trading Tools packages Alpaca MCP access plus Robinhood's official Agentic Trading MCP. Alpaca secrets load from the local Codex secrets directory and Alpaca mutation tools remain prompt-gated. Robinhood Agentic Trading uses the official Streamable HTTP endpoint with the user's requested automatic tool approval policy.
defaultPrompt: Review Alpaca account or market data.
